title: Hadoop MapReduce Reduce Directory
description: The 'lib/reduce' directory in the Hadoop MapReduce architecture houses Java classes responsible for the reduction phase of MapReduce jobs. This includes 'IntSumReducer.java' and 'LongSumReducer.java', which are specific reducer classes for summing integer and long values respectively. These classes extend Hadoop's generic Reducer class, implementing the 'reduce' method to aggregate values associated with the same key. 'WrappedReducer.java' provides a flexible wrapper around any reducer, allowing for custom context implementations. All these classes depend on Hadoop's MapReduce library and IO classes, illustrating their integral role within the Hadoop MapReduce framework. This directory exemplifies the Reduce phase's architectural pattern, showcasing how Hadoop processes intermediate key-value pairs generated by the Map phase to produce final, aggregated results.

raw_response:
TITLE: Hadoop MapReduce Reduce Directory

DESCRIPTION:
The 'lib/reduce' directory in the Hadoop MapReduce architecture houses Java classes responsible for the reduction phase of MapReduce jobs. This includes 'IntSumReducer.java' and 'LongSumReducer.java', which are specific reducer classes for summing integer and long values respectively. These classes extend Hadoop's generic Reducer class, implementing the 'reduce' method to aggregate values associated with the same key. 'WrappedReducer.java' provides a flexible wrapper around any reducer, allowing for custom context implementations. All these classes depend on Hadoop's MapReduce library and IO classes, illustrating their integral role within the Hadoop MapReduce framework. This directory exemplifies the Reduce phase's architectural pattern, showcasing how Hadoop processes intermediate key-value pairs generated by the Map phase to produce final, aggregated results.
